Event delta values match spec 5.1 table verbatim. Codex review #11: now validates --agent against canonical 21-agent set; --agent dve → rc=1 with stderr.

tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.1 lines 112-113 — show 段位+区间 not exact number; last 3 events; placement after role declaration before task instructions. AC-18 verified: ba score=55 + 4 events → stdout has 熟练工匠 + 41-60 + exactly 3 events + no '55' substring + stderr empty.

tasks_completed.description: Created agent-scores.json with global+projects double-track and 21 agents at score:50/rank:熟练工匠/history:[]
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.1 lines 109-110 — schema-reserved for all 21 named agents. AC-17 verified: 21 agents, all at default, top-level keys = {global, projects}.

tasks_completed.description: Created scripts/blast-radius-tool.py — Python ast + grep dual-phase tool with scope filter and dependent_tests search (codex #8)
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.3 — TDAD blast radius. Phase 1 (--files) for BA prediction; Phase 2 (--git-diff) for QA verification. hooks/ severity=critical with behavioral_test_only:true. Codex review #8: now searches tests/** for dependent tests; only emits coverage_gap when none found. AC-04 verified: output contains analyzed_files + edges + coverage_gaps + required_validation; hooks/ gaps severity=critical.

tasks_completed.description: Created scripts/canary-verify.sh — cache-safe SessionStart canary with BLOCKING-behavior tests (codex #5)
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.5 — exec >/dev/null at top; behavioral test of 4 PreToolUse guards. Codex review #5: now asserts unsafe payloads (rm -rf /, 5000-line file) actually exit 2; allow-case false-positive detection. AC-05 verified: zero stdout, rc=0, advisories about session-info.sh / session-git-init.sh stdout pollution emitted to stderr per spec §5.5 Won't Have.

tasks_completed.description: Created agents/test-writer.md with pytest.fail TEST_INCOMPLETE pattern, per-task manifest scoping (codex #10), Dev-replaces-skeleton contract clarification (codex #3)
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.2 — pytest skeleton generator with ac_uid UPDATE vs CREATE. Codex review #10: switched to per-task manifest `tests/generated/<task_id>/manifest.json` + global index `tests/generated/manifest.json` (kind=index) to prevent cross-task AC-id collisions. Codex review #3: Dev contract now explicitly authorises replacing the pytest.fail sentinel block while preserving AC_UID/AC_TYPE/docstring metadata. AC-03 verified.

tasks_completed.description: Modified agents/ba.md: added acceptance_criteria_path + blast_radius_map_path + complexity_tier + risk_level fields (codex #4); added Step 9 (Blast-Radius Phase 1) and Step 10 (Emit Executable AC JSON)
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.6 BA update + spec 5.4 Executable AC. Codex review #4: risk_level now declared as required top-level BA context field with enum {low,medium,high}; test-writer gate logic uses both complexity_tier and risk_level. AC-06, AC-11 verified.

tasks_completed.description: Modified agents/dev.md: replaced 'Blast Radius (Step 3)' with conditional path reading blast_radius_map_path and declaring coverage_gap/exemption
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.6 Dev update — Dev MUST declare addressed_by for each coverage_gap + required_validation. AC-12 verified.

tasks_completed.description: Modified agents/qa.md: added failures[].primary_cause enum + manifest_verification + blast_radius_phase2 blocks; added Step 11 Phase 5 (manifest) and Phase 6 (Phase-2 blast radius); strengthened TEST_INCOMPLETE handling (codex #2); fixed Phase 2 base ref to HEAD (codex #7)
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.6 QA update. Codex #2: remaining TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinels are critical findings (primary_cause: dev_implementation), not 'expected' as initially documented. Codex #7: Phase 2 git base is HEAD (not HEAD~1) because Dev's working-tree mutation set is uncommitted at QA time. AC-07, AC-13 verified.

tasks_completed.description: Modified commands/dev.md: pre-dispatch score-inject at Steps 3/8/11 + strengthened test-writer dispatch block (codex #1) + Sub-step 12.1 post-QA score-update + Step 15 score summary table
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.1 integration. Placement directive (spec 5.1 line 113: 角色声明之后、任务指令之前) explicitly documented for each dispatch. Codex review #1: test-writer dispatch now has a concrete Task block with explicit acceptance_criteria_path / complexity_tier / risk_level inputs and a verification step that the orchestrator MUST NOT proceed to Dev when test_writer_expected=true but manifest is missing. Sub-step 12.1 maps verdict + iteration count + primary_cause → canonical event string. AC-08, AC-16 verified. Pre-existing guard at line 78 (--codex parsing) preserved.

tasks_completed.description: Modified commands/close.md: Step 3 close-outcome score-update + AskUserQuestion 1-5★+跳过 in CLOSE:YES non-force branch + user_rating_N parallel score-update for ba/dev/qa
tasks_completed.rationale: spec 5.1 user-rating mechanism. AskUserQuestion fires ONLY on CLOSE:YES non-force per spec 5.1 line 136 verbatim; CLOSE:NO and --force both skip. AC-09 verified. Pre-existing guards at lines 34 (sentinel-before-todo) and 54 (--force short-circuit) preserved.

Codex #9: added Write(tests/generated/**), Edit(tests/generated/**), and pytest tests/generated:* permissions so test-writer / QA Phase 5 paths do not hit permission prompts. AC-15 verified: settings.json parses as valid JSON; hooks.SessionStart array contains exactly one canary-verify.sh entry.

new_symbols_introduced: BA schema fields: acceptance_criteria_path, blast_radius_map_path, complexity_tier, risk_level
QA schema fields: failures[].primary_cause, manifest_verification, blast_radius_phase2
commands/dev.md: Sub-step 12.1, Mascot Score Changes report section
diff_stats.justification_for_overage: Net-new 6-component implementation per spec Section 5. The bulk of the diff is the scripts themselves (~700 lines of bash+python with embedded heredocs for atomic JSON mutation, dependent_tests grep search, behavioral test payloads, role-tail phrases) plus the spec text added to agents/ba.md / qa.md / commands/dev.md / commands/close.md to document new schema fields, dispatch steps, scoring sub-steps, and AskUserQuestion branching. spec 5.6 explicitly mandates schema additions in ba.md and qa.md; the agent-spec text is the contract Dev/QA will read on every cycle so it must be self-contained. After codex review applied 10 substantive fixes (per-task manifest, dependent_tests search, agent-name validation, blocking-behavior canary tests, risk_level field, strengthened test-writer dispatch + QA TEST_INCOMPLETE handling, Phase 2 base ref, tests/generated permissions, Dev-replaces-skeleton contract). codex #6 (session-info.sh / session-git-init.sh stdout→stderr) explicitly out-of-scope per spec §5.5 Won't Have + B-IT3F-4.

behavioral_test_only:true — canary-verify.sh now asserts blocking-behavior (rm -rf / blocked, echo hello allowed); file not modified this cycle
behavioral_test_only:true — canary-verify.sh now tests with 5000-line oversized file (advisory if guard does not block, per LINE_LIMIT mismatch documented out-of-scope); file not modified this cycle
behavioral_test_only:true — canary-verify.sh asserts git status not blocked; file not modified this cycle

dev.qa_notes: All 18 ACs from docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-20260519-132417.json pass programmatically. Codex review applied 10 substantive fixes; #6 (session-info.sh / session-git-init.sh stdout→stderr) is out-of-scope per spec §5.5 Won't Have and B-IT3F-4. The hooks/ files are NOT modified this cycle — exemptions declared above. QA Phase 5 (manifest verification) is N/A this cycle because test-writer was not dispatched in-band by the orchestrator (this cycle is the meta-cycle implementing test-writer; the orchestrator's commands/dev.md was modified to invoke test-writer in future cycles when complexity_tier >= STANDARD OR risk_level == high). QA Phase 6 (blast-radius Phase 2) MAY be run by QA via `python3 scripts/blast-radius-tool.py --git-diff --base HEAD --output .claude/dev-registry/dev-20260519-132417/blast-radius-map-phase2.json --task-id 20260519-132417` to cross-check declarations against the actual git working-tree changes.

permissions_to_add.reason: test-writer agent writes pytest skeletons under tests/generated/<task_id>/
Dev fills in skeleton bodies; QA may patch tests during Phase 5

self_verification.notes: All 18 ACs verified programmatically (rc=0). Bash syntax check passed for 3 .sh files; python3 -m py_compile passed for blast-radius-tool.py. settings.json validates as JSON. agent-scores.json validates as JSON with all 21 agents at default state. Codex review applied 10 of 11 findings; #6 explicitly out-of-scope per spec Won't Have.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex (gpt-5.5, xhigh) returned 11 issues with PROPOSED_FIX, all in adversarial-review mode against the on-disk implementation: (1) thin test-writer dispatch in Step 8 — orchestrator could silently skip; (2) QA documented TEST_INCOMPLETE as 'expected' — fail-open hardblock; (3) test-writer skeleton + Dev 'cannot modify assertion logic' was internally contradictory; (4) risk_level missing from BA schema despite trigger gate dependency; (5) canary tested invocability not blocking-behavior — fail-open guard would still pass; (6) session-info.sh / session-git-init.sh stdout pollution remained; (7) QA Phase 2 base ref HEAD~1 would mix unrelated changes; (8) blast-radius-tool always reported every file as untested; (9) Write/Edit/pytest permissions missing for tests/generated; (10) global manifest archives unrelated tasks since every task has AC-01; (11) score-update.sh silently created agents on typos like 'dve'.

findings.rationale: commands/dev.md Step 8 now has explicit dispatch + verify-on-disk check

findings.proposed_fix: treat remaining sentinels as critical primary_cause:dev_implementation
allow Dev to replace skeleton block while preserving metadata
add risk_level top-level field with enum
findings.rationale: agents/ba.md JSON schema now declares complexity_tier + risk_level

findings.proposed_fix: add negative payloads, assert rc=2 for unsafe cases
findings.rationale: canary-verify.sh now asserts rm -rf / → rc=2 (bash-safety); 5000-line file → advisory if not blocked (LINE_LIMIT mismatch out-of-scope)

findings.proposed_fix: convert stdout to stderr in those hooks
findings.rationale: Explicitly Won't Have per spec §5.5 and B-IT3F-4. Canary continues to emit advisory; the proper remediation is a follow-up cycle that converts session-info.sh / session-git-init.sh stdout to stderr (with AC-19 if escalated to Must Have).
blast-radius-tool.py find_dependent_tests() added; coverage_gap only emitted when no dependent tests found
settings.json updated with 4 additional allow patterns
agents/test-writer.md switched to per-task manifest under tests/generated/<task_id>/manifest.json plus thin global index
score-update.sh CANONICAL_AGENTS check at line 100; --agent dve → rc=1 stderr message

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: 10 of 11 findings applied substantively (#1-5, #7-11). #6 is documented out-of-scope per the spec §5.5 Won't Have list and B-IT3F-4 (session-info.sh / session-git-init.sh stdout→stderr fix is a separate follow-up work item; canary's current advisory behaviour is intentional so existing sessions are not blocked).

recommendations: Future cycle: move session-info.sh and session-git-init.sh stdout to stderr; promote canary advisory to failure (B-IT3F-4 follow-up).
Future cycle: narrow tool-policy.v1 update to authorise BA writes to */docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-*.json and */.claude/dev-registry/*/blast-radius-map.json (B-IT3F-1 follow-up).
Future cycle: tune score deltas based on observed cycle outcomes (spec 5.1 line 114 — '分值待定': user has explicitly noted current values are pending calibration).
Future cycle: add expert-agent (ui-specialist, architect, etc.) event triggers; schema is pre-reserved at score:50 awaiting events.
